argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const limit = {{ limit }} || 3; const pageSize = Math.min(Math.max(limit, 3), 10); const formatPostTime = (ts) => { if (!ts) return ''; const CST_OFFSET_MS = 8 * 60 * 60 * 1000; const date = new Date(ts + CST_OFFSET_MS); const pad = (v) => String(v).padStart(2, '0'); const year = date.getUTCFullYear(); const month = pad(date.getUTCMonth() + 1); const day = pad(date.getUTCDate()); const hour = pad(date.getUTCHours()); const minute = pad(date.getUTCMinutes()); return year + '年' + month + '月' + day + '日 ' + hour + ':' + minute; }; const buildNoteDetailUrl = (noteId) => noteId ? 'https://creator.xiaohongshu.com/statistics/note-detail?noteId=' + encodeURIComponent(noteId) : ''; const toPercentString = (v) => v == null ? '' : v + '%'; try { const resp = await fetch('/api/galaxy/creator/datacenter/note/analyze/list?type=0&page_size=' + pageSize + '&page_num=1', { credentials: 'include' }); if (!resp.ok) return { error: 'HTTP ' + resp.status }; const data = await resp.json(); const items = data?.data?.note_infos ?? []; if (!items.length) return { error: 'No notes found' }; const summaries = []; for (let i = 0; i < Math.min(items.length, limit); i++) { const note = items[i]; const noteId = note.id ?? ''; let detail = { views: note.read_count ?? 0, likes: note.like_count ?? 0, collects: note.fav_count ?? 0, comments: note.comment_count ?? 0, shares: 0, avgViewTime: '', riseFans: 0, topSource: '', topSourcePct: '', topInterest: '', topInterestPct: '' }; if (noteId) { try { const detailResp = await fetch('/api/galaxy/creator/datacenter/note/audience?note_id=' + noteId, { credentials: 'include' }); if (detailResp.ok) { const detailJson = await detailResp.json(); const sourceItems = detailJson?.data?.source ?? []; const sortedSources = [...sourceItems].sort((a, b) => (b.value_with_double ?? 0) - (a.value_with_double ?? 0)); if (sortedSources[0]) { detail.topSource = sortedSources[0].title || ''; detail.topSourcePct = toPercentString(sortedSources[0].value_with_double); } } } catch {} } summaries.push({ rank: i + 1, id: noteId, title: note.title ?? '', date: formatPostTime(note.post_time), views: String(detail.views), likes: String(detail.likes), collects: String(detail.collects), comments: String(detail.comments), shares: String(detail.shares), avg_view_time: detail.avgViewTime, rise_fans: String(detail.riseFans), top_source: detail.topSource, top_source_pct: detail.topSourcePct, top_interest: detail.topInterest, top_interest_pct: detail.topInterestPct, url: buildNoteDetailUrl(noteId) }); } return { summaries }; } catch (e) { return { error: e.message }; } }

async (intermediate) => { if (intermediate.error) return [{ rank: 0, id: '', title: 'Error: ' + intermediate.error, date: '', views: '', likes: '', collects: '', comments: '', shares: '', avg_view_time: '', rise_fans: '', top_source: '', top_source_pct: '', top_interest: '', top_interest_pct: '', url: '' }]; return intermediate.summaries || []; }

description: 小红书最近笔记批量摘要 (列表 + 单篇关键数据汇总)
name: CreatorNotesSummary

variables.name: limit
variables.help: Number of recent notes to summarize
